top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM comments c
INNER JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM comments c
INNER JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM comments c
INNER JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score >= 5 AND c.Score <= 10;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.UpVotes = 0 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE c.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;
